title: Country Baskets Chapel Pillar Candle, 12 cm, Ivory
features: Designed to burn long and strong
description: Product Description Traditional and long lasting pillar candle is designed to burn long and strong. The classic Chapel Candle is available in a wide range of sizes and is generally used for large events, most will last the entire length of the event depending on the size and burning hours of the candle. Some are of the size suitable for home use where as the larger ones are good for events. Designed for easy storage. Box Contains 1 x Chapel Pillar Candle, 12 cm
